error.cannot_fetch_teams: Could not fetch teams from ESPN. Check your connection and try again.
error.no_teams_found: No teams found for that search term. Try a different name or leave blank for manual entry.

user.description: Select a league, then optionally type a team name to search. Leave the search field empty to enter the team ID manually.

select_team.title: Select Team
select_team.description: Choose your team from the search results.

manual.title: Manual Entry
manual.description:
Enter the team abbreviation as shown on ESPN scoreboards (e.g. NE, LAL, BVB).

Conference Number: For NCAA football and basketball only. See README.md for valid values.

path.title: Custom API Configurator
path.description: Enter the 'sport' and 'league' portion of the ESPN API path to use a self-configured API

init.title: Team Tracker Options
init.description: Enter the 2-character language code to use for the API call.
